import './../css/about_me.scss' const AboutMe = () => { return (

About Me

Introduction

I am Fabian and I am interested in learning new skills from AI, Crypto, Cloud Computing to Full Stack Development

This is a place where I will display mini project that I worked on during my free time

All that you are seeing here is still work in progress!

Tech Involved

  • HTML
  • SCSS
  • JavaScript
  • react.js
  • My Tech Stack is not limited to this list!
  • Thank you for visiting!
); } export default AboutMe;
